sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 108 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.4 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No.2168/2024. 3. For orders on CMA No.2169/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 28.04.2026 Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for the applicant. Per learned counsel the questions proposed have already been decided against the applicant department by virtue of Supreme Court order dated 16.01.2025 passed in CPLA 2400-L/2022. In view hereof, reference application is dismissed. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
